content.problemStatement:
Read problem statements in Vietnamese,

Chef is planning a heist in the reserve bank of Chefland. They are planning to hijack the bank for DDD days and print the money. The initial rate of printing the currency is PPP dollars per day and they increase the production by QQQ dollars after every interval of ddd days. For example, after ddd days the rate is P+QP+QP+Q dollars per day, and after 2d2d2d days the rate is P+2QP+2QP+2Q dollars per day, and so on. Output the amount of money they will be able to print in the given period.
content.inputFormat:
The first line contains an integer TTT, the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
Each test case contains a single line of input, four integers D,d,P,QD, d, P, QD,d,P,Q.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output in a single line the answer to the problem.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 111:

On the first day, the rate of production is 111 dollar per day so 111 dollar is printed on the first day.
On the second day, the rate of production is 1+1=21 + 1 = 21+1=2 dollars per day so 222 dollars are printed on the second day.
The total amount of money printed in 222 days is 1+2=31 + 2 = 31+2=3 dollars.

Test Case 222:

For the first two days, the rate of production is 111 dollar per day so 1⋅2=21 \cdot 2 = 21⋅2=2 dollars are printed on the first two days.
On the third day, the rate of production is 1+1=21 + 1 = 21+1=2 dollars per day so 222 dollars are printed on the third day.
The total amount of money printed in 333 days is 2+2=42 + 2 = 42+2=4 dollars.

Test Case 333:

For the first two days, the rate of production is 111 dollar per day so 1⋅2=21 \cdot 2 = 21⋅2=2 dollars are printed on the first two days.
On the next two days, the rate of production is 1+2=31 + 2 = 31+2=3 dollars per day so 3⋅2=63 \cdot 2 = 63⋅2=6 dollars are printed on the next two days.
On the last day, the rate of production is 3+2=53 + 2 = 53+2=5 dollars per day so 555 dollars are printed on the last day.
The total amount of money printed in 555 days is 2+6+5=132 + 6 + 5 = 132+6+5=13 dollars.
